LTC value is provided (i.e., if the value is 16 or 21– 36), 
the patient residence field (the PTNT_RSDNC_CD) must equal “03.” 

This variable is different than the days supply of the medication on the PDE (the DAYS_SUPLY_NUM 
variable). 

This variable was new in 2013 and required for all PDEs beginning on February 28, 2013. This variable 
became the SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_1 in 2025 in the source data, when additional submission 
clarification code fields became available (SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_2–
